sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9049" key="a)nisa=ton" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνῑσᾶτον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n9049.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">decoction of aniseed,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:8:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.2</biblScope> </bibl>: also <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀννησᾶτον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:5:33:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.33.10</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (interpol.).</sense> </entryFree>
